In [5]:
import polars as pl
pl.Config.set_tbl_rows( 50 )
pl.Config.set_tbl_cols( 150 )
pl.Config.set_fmt_str_lengths( 50 )

(
  df.group_by( 'un' ).agg(
    pl.col( 'files_size' ).sum( ).alias( 'total_files_size' )
  )
  .sort( 'total_files_size', descending = True )
  .with_columns(
    sub_es.human_bytes( pl.col( 'total_files_size' ) )
  )
)
